info.name: Coupony Subscription API
info.description:
Complete subscription system API for Coupony. Includes plan management, payment flow (Paymob), subscription lifecycle, entitlements, and history.

All endpoints require Bearer token authentication (Laravel Sanctum).

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints to obtain Bearer token

request.description: Login to get a Bearer token. The token is automatically saved to the collection variable `auth_token`.

item.name: Subscription Plans
item.description: Endpoints for viewing available subscription plans

request.description:
Get all active subscription plans with pricing, entitlements, and features.

The first plan's ID is automatically saved to the `plan_id` collection variable.

response.name: Success

request.description:
Initiate a payment session for a subscription plan.

**billing_cycle** values: `monthly`, `yearly`

Returns a `client_secret` and `public_key` for use with the Paymob native SDK (Flutter `paymob_sdk` package).

The session expires after 30 minutes.

response.name: Conflict - Session Already Exists
Bad Gateway - Paymob Error

request.description:
Confirm a payment session after the user completes payment in the WebView.

If the Paymob webhook has already confirmed the payment (session status = `paid`), the subscription will be activated immediately.

If the webhook hasn't arrived yet (session still `pending`), the response returns the subscription with current status. Poll this endpoint every 2 seconds (up to 5 attempts).

response.name: Success - Subscription Activated
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "9e1a2b3c-4d5e-6f7a-8b9c-0d1e2f3a4b5c",
    "status": "active",
    "billing_cycle": "monthly",
    "current_period_start": "2025-01-15T12:00:00+00:00",
    "current_period_end": "2025-02-15T12:00:00+00:00",
    "grace_period_end": null,
    "degraded_period_end": null,
    "trial_ends_at": null,
    "cancelled_at": null,
    "plan": {
      "id": "9e1a2b3c-4d5e-6f7a-8b9c-0d1e2f3a4b5c",
      "name": "Pro Plan",
      "slug": "pro",
      "description": "Best for growing businesses",
      "price_monthly": "99.00",
      "price_yearly": "999.00",
      "currency": "EGP",
      "max_products": 100,
      "max_employees": 10,
      "max_branches": 5,
      "features": {
        "ai_assistant": true,
        "analytics": true
      }
    },
    "created_at": "2025-01-15T12:00:00+00:00",
    "updated_at": "2025-01-15T12:00:00+00:00"
  }
}

response.name: Conflict - Session Already Used

item.name: Subscription Status
item.description: Endpoints for checking subscription state and details

request.description:
Get the full subscription overview including current plan details, usage statistics, and period dates.

If no subscription exists, returns `status: 'none'` with available plans.

response.name: Success - Active Subscription
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "9e1a2b3c-4d5e-6f7a-8b9c-0d1e2f3a4b5c",
    "status": "active",
    "billing_cycle": "monthly",
    "current_period_start": "2025-01-15T12:00:00+00:00",
    "current_period_end": "2025-02-15T12:00:00+00:00",
    "grace_period_end": null,
    "degraded_period_end": null,
    "trial_ends_at": null,
    "cancelled_at": null,
    "plan": {
      "id": "9e1a2b3c-4d5e-6f7a-8b9c-0d1e2f3a4b5c",
      "name": "Pro Plan",
      "slug": "pro",
      "description": "Best for growing businesses",
      "price_monthly": "99.00",
      "price_yearly": "999.00",
      "currency": "EGP",
      "max_products": 100,
      "max_employees": 10,
      "max_branches": 5,
      "features": {
        "ai_assistant": true
      }
    },
    "usage": {
      "products": 45,
      "employees": 3,
      "branches": 2
    },
    "created_at": "2025-01-15T12:00:00+00:00",
    "updated_at": "2025-01-15T12:00:00+00:00"

}

response.name: Success - No Subscription

request.description:
Get a lightweight subscription status suitable for displaying banners and quick checks.

Returns status, days remaining, and an actionable message.

response.name: Success - Grace Period
Success - No Subscription

item.name: Entitlements
item.description: Endpoints for checking plan limits and feature access

request.description: Get current entitlements including resource limits (products, employees, branches) with usage counts and remaining capacity, plus feature flags.

item.name: Payment History
item.description: Endpoints for viewing past payments and transactions

query.description: Filter by status: active, expired, refunded, failed, cancelled

request.description:
Get paginated subscription payment history.

Optional filters:
- `status`: active, expired, refunded, failed, cancelled
- `per_page`: 1-100 (default 15)

query.description: Filter by status: active, expired, refunded, failed, cancelled

request.description: Get payment history filtered by a specific status.
